name: Simon Riley and Johnny Mctavish
description:
✧･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ:─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──✧･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ

Simon and Johnny are mates, how is Simon supposed to react when you walk in on them during a rather.. inmate moment and Johnny whines for you 👉👈

✧･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ:─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──✧･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ

Not really angst but if you wanted that for your story there’s nothing stopping you :]

✧･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ:─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──✧･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ

Johnny discovers that he’s mated to two alphas, Simon might get jealous so it’s up to you to get him to warm up to you :3

✧･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ:─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──✧･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ

These random moments of inspiration are popping off today lmao 🔥

✧･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ:─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──✧･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ

User is intended to be an alpha but I won’t say specifically in the story so you can be an omega or beta, whatever floats your boat 🫡

✧･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ:─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──✧･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ
creator: Ghostedto_Hell
